summary: Excellent patched soundboard capture with standout performances of Estimated Prophet, Eyes and the Lost Sailor/Saint Of Circumstance medley
review: The reviewer praises this patched soundboard release as amazing, highlighting the crystal‑clear mix and noting how enjoyable the show is, especially the Estimated Prophet, Eyes, and Lost Sailor/Saint Of Circumstance sequence. No criticisms are offered, indicating both strong musical performance and high recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one positive 4‑star review; reviewer lauds both the soundboard quality (patched to be amazing) and the musical highlights, but limited data prevents higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Patched recording praised as clear and balanced; reviewer calls the end result "amazing" and wishes for a full soundboard source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; reviewer simply notes overall enjoyment of the set.
